nodes.label: AI memory reliability in long conversations
nodes.label_negative: AI failing to prepare for real-world scenarios
nodes.grounding_span: I often use it when preparing for my workday, such as rehearsing conversations I'm going to be having with people

nodes.label: AI as tool for feedback and critique
nodes.label_negative: AI generating unnecessary or irrelevant critique
nodes.grounding_span: I do sometimes have problems with the AI seeming to give me critiques for no good reason

nodes.label: AI for data analysis and report writing
nodes.grounding_span: I also wouldn't use it for writing reports, since my writing skills are fairly sound and I imagine that it wouldn't be able to provide nuance

nodes.label: AI integration in police force: trust vs. caution
nodes.label_negative: AI not trusted due to lack of knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: there is not enough known about it for it to be trusted

nodes.label: AI impact on skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: AI taking over areas of strength, pushing to weaker areas
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that I'll be pushed more into areas where my skills are not that great

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: my writing skills are fairly sound

nodes.label: Workload balance and role security
nodes.grounding_span: freeing up the workload for a lot of us on the force but probably also forcing us to take on more work in other areas

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: I ultimately felt very unprepared, or like I'd prepared for the wrong kinds of things

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing skills
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that I'll be pushed more into areas where my skills are not that great

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: As AI improves, I expect it to hopefully develop into more natural discussions

nodes.label: Scenario-based role-play and iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I give the AI a basic rundown of the most principle kind of elements of the situation

nodes.label: Pragmatic boundary-setting based on task importance
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely don't use AI (and am extra cautious to not have it on my history) when dealing with personal data
